steps.title: Concept & Design
steps.description: Every work begins with a mood, a colour story, or an emotional intention — sketched and refined before a drop of resin is poured.

steps.title: Material Preparation
steps.description: Resins are measured, pigments blended, and texture mediums prepared — each formula is calibrated for the specific piece.

steps.title: Hand Crafting
steps.description: Pours, trowels, sculpting, and layering — entirely by hand. No two pieces can ever be identical; each carries its own signature.

steps.title: Cure & Finish
steps.description: After curing, pieces are sealed with UV-resistant topcoat for longevity, then inspected and signed before being carefully packaged.
